welcome: Welcome to this fabulous mortgage calculator!
invalid_message: This does not look like a valid entry.
apr: What is your Annual Percentage Rate (APR). For example, please enter 6.51 for 6.51%.
duration_in_years: What is your loan duration in years. For example, please enter 30 for 30 years.
